name: vibe-coding-assistant
description: AI coding assistant with file editing tools

vibe-coding.confirmChanges.description: Whether to ask for confirmation before applying file changes (edit tool)

vibe-coding.confirmShellCommand.description: Whether to ask for confirmation before executing run_shell_command (after shell review); independent from confirmChanges

vibe-coding.maxInteractions.description: Maximum number of tool call iterations (-1 means unlimited)

vibe-coding.maxSequenceLength.description: Maximum length for generated text sequences

vibe-coding.todolistReview.enabled.description: When true, create_todo_list runs a blocking independent LLM review for todolist.generate / todolist.edit before applying changes.

vibe-coding.todolistReview.maxAttempts.description: Max review/regenerate rounds per create_todo_list call (generate or expand).

vibe-coding.todolistReview.reviewTimeout.description: HTTP timeout (ms) for each review-agent and regenerate (generate) API call.

vibe-coding.todolistReview.editorTimeout.description: HTTP timeout (ms) for each editor-agent API call (todolist.edit expand retries).

vibe-coding.editReview.enabled.description: When true, code edit tool calls run a blocking independent LLM review (separate from the main assistant) before applying changes.

vibe-coding.editReview.timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout (ms) for the independent review call used by the code edit tool.

vibe-coding.shellCommandReview.enabled.description: When true, run_shell_command runs a shell editor agent plus an independent safety review before optional human confirmation.

vibe-coding.shellCommandReview.maxAttemp.description: Max editor/review rounds per run_shell_command call.

vibe-coding.shellCommandReview.reviewTim.description: HTTP timeout (ms) for each shell safety review API call.

vibe-coding.shellCommandReview.editorTim.description: HTTP timeout (ms) for each shell editor agent API call.
